name: ic-light-background
description: 🖼️✨Background images + prompts to auto-magically relights your images (+normal maps🗺️)

appended_prompt.description: Additional text to be appended to the main prompt, enhancing image quality
appended_prompt.title: Appended Prompt

background_image.description: The background image that will be used to relight the main foreground image
background_image.title: Background Image

cfg.description: Classifier-Free Guidance scale - higher values encourage adherence to prompt, lower values encourage more creative interpretation
cfg.title: Cfg

compute_normal.description: Whether to compute the normal maps (slower but provides additional output images)
compute_normal.title: Compute Normal

height.description: The height of the generated images in pixels
height.title: height

highres_denoise.description: Controls the amount of denoising applied when refining the high resolution output (higher = more adherence to the upscaled latent, lower = more creative details added)
highres_denoise.title: Highres Denoise

highres_scale.description: The multiplier for the final output resolution relative to the initial latent resolution
highres_scale.title: Highres Scale

light_source.description: The type and position of lighting to apply to the initial background latent
light_source.title: light_source

negative_prompt.default: lowres, bad anatomy, bad hands, cropped, worst quality
negative_prompt.description: A text description of attributes to avoid in the generated images
negative_prompt.title: Negative Prompt

number_of_images.description: The number of unique images to generate from the given input and settings
number_of_images.title: Number Of Images

output_format.description: The image file format of the generated output images
output_format.title: output_format

output_quality.description: The image compression quality (for lossy formats like JPEG and WebP). 100 = best quality, 0 = lowest quality.
output_quality.title: Output Quality

prompt.description: A text description guiding the relighting and generation process
prompt.title: Prompt

seed.description: A fixed random seed for reproducible results (omit this parameter for a randomized seed)
seed.title: Seed

steps.description: The number of diffusion steps to perform during generation (more steps generally improves image quality but increases processing time)
steps.title: Steps

subject_image.description: The main foreground image to be relighted
subject_image.title: Subject Image

width.description: The width of the generated images in pixels
width.title: width
